name: GDPR Compliance Checklist.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
GOV-001  GDPR Compliance Checklist
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
GDPR Compliance Checklist
Working compliance checklist used during contract review and privacy sign-off.
Document ID
GOV-001
Owner
Privacy Counsel
Version
0.9 working copy
Prepared Date
2024-03-13
Status
In review / indexing
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Checklist Scope
Working review of the Northwind contract package against the most relevant GDPR controller-processor and cross-border
transfer expectations for Meridian’s planned EU analytics workloads.
Requirement Matrix
Req ID
Requirement
Primary Source
Status
Notes
GDPR-ART-2
8
Processor obligations documented in
writing.
CTR-013 DPA §§1-2
Pass
Roles and security measures
captured.
GDPR-ART-3
2
Appropriate technical and organisational
measures documented.
CTR-013 DPA §2
Partial
High-level controls only;
evidence pack still required.
GDPR-ART-4
4
International transfers use a lawful
mechanism.
CTR-013 DPA §5.4
Gap
SCC Appendix C reserved
but not attached.
GDPR-ART-4
6
Appropriate safeguards for transfers are
documented.
CTR-013 / LEG-001
Gap
No executed SCCs or
supplemental-measures
memo included.
GDPR-ART-3
0
Processing details captured.
CTR-013 Appendix
A
Pass
Processing categories and
data subjects described.
GDPR-ART-3
3
Incident escalation and reporting pathway
defined.
POL-031 / CTR-010
Partial
Policy and contract timing
remain vague or inconsistent.
Key open action: attach SCC Appendix C and either restrict EU analytics data to EEA processing or
document the transfer-impact rationale.
